title: Adventurer Skills [Pufferfish's Skills]
description: A custom rebalanced skill tree addon for Pufferfish’s Skills.
body:
![Skill Tree Example](https://i.imgur.com/LoqDXvp.png)

Welcome to the **Adventurer Skills [Pufferfish's Skills]**, a custom addon for Pufferfish’s Skills that introduces a fully redesigned and rebalanced skill tree inspired by Skills Mastery by DefinitelyNotADoctor.

This addon brings a refreshed progression system, improved visuals, and a more strategic approach to character development. Originally created for the **AVENTURA – The Adventure Experience** modpack, it can also be used standalone, offering a fresh take on the Pufferfish’s Skills system.

[![Kinetic Hosting Banner](https://i.imgur.com/WzP8oN5.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1208)
🌐 **Kinetic Hosting** is proudly sponsoring this mod! Start your adventure with friends and dive into the full server experience. Enjoy a smooth, reliable, and secure hosting experience powered by Kinetic Hosting.

# DESCRIPTION
The **Adventurer Skills [Pufferfish’s Skills]** addon enhances progression without making the player overpowered too early. Each category grants meaningful upgrades such as bonus health, stronger melee damage, faster regeneration, higher jumps, improved movement speed, and more.

- 🎯 Custom Skill Tree inspired by Skills Mastery and redesigned for clarity and balance.
- ⚔️ 4 Core Categories: Offensive, Defensive, Utility, and Versatile — each offering unique stat boosts and abilities.
- 📈 Balanced Progression Curve: early levels are easy to obtain, but higher levels require strategy and long-term investment.
- 🎨 New Background & UI Enhancements for a cleaner and more immersive menu.
- 🌐 Fully translated into Spanish, offering an accessible option for Spanish-speaking players.
- 🧩 Compatible with single-player and modpacks, optimized especially for use with AVENTURA.

# 📦 RECOMMENDED SETUP
For the best experience, this addon is designed to complement the full AVENTURA – The Adventure Experience modpack:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/aventura-the-adventure-experience

Using both together provides a cohesive adventure, skill progression, and world-building experience.

# 🙌 CREDITS
Skill concepts & base inspiration from Skills Mastery [Pufferfish’s Skills] by DefinitelyNotADoctor https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/skills-mastery-pufferfishs-skills
Additional balancing, UI redesign, translation, and integration by SundGGs for the AVENTURA project.
